race.comment: ILIAD (12) was an impressive winner last time over 1312m at Mt Gambier, leading throughout and putting 2.25 lengths on her rivals. A repeat of that will have her tough to beat. VAAFEE (2) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 1.3 lengths when fifth over 1715m at Geelong. Back in trip suits here. KNOCK OF BEERS (7) progressed nicely last time out to finish just 0.8 lengths from the winner in second over 1300m at Avoca and she looks to be trending in the right direction. FOXY HEART (3) was beaten 7 lengths into fifth in a 1200m contest at Avoca two weeks ago but that was only the third run back from a spell and he now looks ready for his first crack at 1400m.
